description: You are a pricing analyst at GardenWorld Garden Supplies. Create a new sales price list named '2025 Spring Retail' for the upcoming spring season with Currency: USD, Sales Price List: Yes, and Price Precision: 2. Within this price list, create a version named '2025 Spring Retail April' valid from 04/01/2025. Add product pricing for the following items: Azalea Bush (List: 29.99, Standard: 24.99, Limit: 19.99), Elm Tree (List: 149.99, Standard: 129.99, Limit: 109.99), and Oak Tree (List: 249.99, Standard: 219.99, Limit: 189.99). Ensure all master data configuration records are saved.
